name: wasm4pm
description: High-performance process mining monorepo with WASM acceleration

scripts.release: pnpm run build && pnpm run test && pnpm run lint
scripts.release:full: pnpm run release:verify && pnpm run release:verify-versions && pnpm run release:generate-schemas && pnpm run release:generate-changelog && pnpm run release:generate-sbom
scripts.build:all: pnpm run build:wasm && pnpm run build:engine && pnpm run build:cli
scripts.dev: pnpm run build:engine && pnpm run build:cli
scripts.ci:test: pnpm run lint && pnpm run test
scripts.generate:algorithms: unrdf sync --config unrdf.toml --rule algorithm-registry && pnpm --filter @wasm4pm/templates build
scripts.generate:prediction-tasks: unrdf sync --config unrdf.toml --rule prediction-tasks && pnpm --filter @wasm4pm/templates build
scripts.docs:check: npm run docs:lint && npm run docs:link-check
